title: Proclamation No. 559, s. 1969
text:
MALACAÑANG RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 559

DESIGNATING THE PERIOD FROM JUNE 1 TO AUGUST 15, 1969, FOR THE TWENTIETH ANNUAL EDUCATIONAL AND FUND CAMPAIGN OF THE COMMUNITY CHEST.

To enable the Community Chest to carry on its community welfare services, I, FERDINAND E. MARCOS, President of the Philippines, do hereby designate the period from June 1 to August 15, 1969, for its twenty-first annual educational and fund campaign.

I call upon all residents, firms and organizations especially in the City of Manila, Quezon City, Pasay City, Caloocan City and municipalities of Makati, Malabon, Mandaluong, Marikina, Navotas, Las Piñas, Paranaque, Pasig and San Juan, Province of Rizal to support this campaign and to give generously to the Community Chest which unites into one annual appeal the 35 fund campaigns of the following welfare agencies:

Abiertas House of Friendship American Philippine Guardian Asociaeion de Damas de Filipinas Settlement House Asilo de San Vicente de Paul Catholic Youth Organization Citizens’ council for mass media. Free Legal Aid Clinic St. Joseph’s Patronage of the Sick St. Philomena’s Patronage of the Sick Poor Patronato de Nuestra Sra. de Lourdes Patronato de Santa Luisade Marillac Girl Scouts of the Philippines Quezon City Girl Scouts Council Pasay City Girl Scouts Council Manila Girl Scouts Council Rizal Girl Scouts Council Caloocan City Girl Scouts Council Good Shepherd Convent Heart of Mary Villa La Protection de la Infancia Manila Children’s Hospital Gota de Leche National Federation of Women’s Clubs Nursery Classes Philippine Association of the Deaf Philippine Band of Mercy Philippine Agency for Community and Family YMCA of the Philippines Manila YMCA Downtown YMCA Quezon City YMCA YWCA of the Philippines Manila YMCA General Assembly of the Blind Family Life Workshop of the Philippines Young Christian Workers Community Development Center

I authorize and urge all government officials and employees including all school authorities and teachers, to accept, for the Community Chest, fund-raising responsibilities and to give it full support and dedicated leadership in their respective communities.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 19th day of May, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-nine.

(Sgd.) FERDINAND E. MARCOS President of the Philippines

By the President:

(Sgd.) RAFAEL M. SALAS Executive Secretary

Source : University of the Philippines, College of Law Library
